title: caroxylon laricinum
intro: Caroxylon laricinum is a plant species, also known as the "Kalmung tree" or "Kalmung" in some regions. The medicinal properties of Caroxylon laricinum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and cold due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of consuming Caroxylon laricinum include its potential to aid in weight loss and improve digestion, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Caroxylon laricinum may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any new herbal remedy.
